channel.title: alfiecooks_ TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from alfiecooks_

item.title: BROCCOLI STEAKS + BEETROOT HUMMUS 🥦 revisiting a recipe that encapsulates how I love to cook best. taking two humble vegetables, like broccoli and beetroot, then transforming one into ’steaks’, the other into hummus. two elements that then come together t
item.description: BROCCOLI STEAKS + BEETROOT HUMMUS 🥦 revisiting a recipe that encapsulates how I love to cook best. taking two humble vegetables, like broccoli and beetroot, then transforming one into ’steaks’, the other into hummus. two elements that then come together t

item.title: SPICY MISO RAMEN 🍜 IN MY NEW KITCHEN finally! the first recipe video filmed in my new kitchen. it had to be special, so I made my Spicy Miso Ramen with Roasted Aubergine + Crispy Oyster Mushrooms. a warming bowl of noodle soup that was seriously worth wa

item.title: MISO BREAKFAST BEANS + APPLE PIE CHAI 🍎☕️🍁 Cooking for your partner is one of the best things you can do. And with the weather getting colder, there’s nothing like a comforting breakfast to keep things cosy ❤️ ad I’ve taken beans on toast to the next leve

item.title: if you’d told a younger Alfie that in 2025, the work he was doing meant he’d be nominated for a food award, I’m not sure he’d believe you. well, here we are ❣️ food has been one of the true loves of my life for as long I can remember. and that lifelong pa

item.title: BALSAMIC GLAZED LEEKS + MUHAMMARA 🌶️ leeks might be one of my favourite vegetables. they’re bang in season, so here, I’ve served them as the star of the show. seared, then glazed with balsamic vinegar + sat on a bed of muhammara, a delicious roasted red p
item.description: BALSAMIC GLAZED LEEKS + MUHAMMARA 🌶️ leeks might be one of my favourite vegetables. they’re bang in season, so here, I’ve served them as the star of the show. seared, then glazed with balsamic vinegar + sat on a bed of muhammara, a delicious roasted red p

item.title: FUL MEDAMES 🫘 Whenever my girlfriend works from home, I always cook her something tasty. Today, that was Ful Medames - a delicious bowl of beans. But when it comes to coffee, my barista skills tend to let me down a little…☕️ ad | until now! I’ve always fo

item.title: december is here! like many of you, I'm starting to think about what to cook for Christmas - which always requires a little bit more thought when you don't eat meat... (in answer to the video's question, no I don't miss it 😂 ) anyway, thinking about it to
item.description: december is here! like many of you, I'm starting to think about what to cook for Christmas - which always requires a little bit more thought when you don't eat meat... (in answer to the video's question, no I don't miss it 😂 ) anyway, thinking about it to

item.title: LEEK + POTATO SOUP 🥔 over 4 million potatoes are thrown away every day in the UK. that’s over 1.5 billion in the bin per year, and that’s just in one country 😢 so, for Episode 6 of Soup Season 3, I’ve made my Leek + Potato Soup. over Christmas, I reckon w
item.description: LEEK + POTATO SOUP 🥔 over 4 million potatoes are thrown away every day in the UK. that’s over 1.5 billion in the bin per year, and that’s just in one country 😢 so, for Episode 6 of Soup Season 3, I’ve made my Leek + Potato Soup. over Christmas, I reckon w

item.title: 🥟 THAI RED DUMPLING SOUP 🍜 in the build up to Christmas, this is exactly the sort of food I want to eat. a speedy Thai Red Dumpling Soup. done in no time at all, it’s proper comfort food that’s cooked quick 😍 AD | what I don’t want to be worrying about

item.title: 🍛 VEG KATSU CURRY 🍠 you can’t beat a classic like katsu curry. and this is the way I like to make it at home 👨🏻‍🍳 you can access the full written recipe for free via the link in my bio 🙏 #katsu #curry #comfortfood #japanesefood #plantbasedrecipes

item.title: KHAO SOI (Thai Coconut Curry Noodle Soup) 🇹🇭🍜 some of the world’s best soups come from Thailand - and I’m VERY excited to be visiting for the first time in a few weeks 🌞 but, as much as I love Tom Yum and Tom Kha, I realised I’d never tried (or made) a Kh

item.title: CRISPY ENOKI MUSHROOMS 🍄‍🟫 I haven’t eaten chicken for 6 years - but I didn’t stop because I didn’t like the taste of meat. I stopped because I didn’t want to eat the animals my food once was…🐓🐥 so the question was - could there be a way to recreate some
item.description: CRISPY ENOKI MUSHROOMS 🍄‍🟫 I haven’t eaten chicken for 6 years - but I didn’t stop because I didn’t like the taste of meat. I stopped because I didn’t want to eat the animals my food once was…🐓🐥 so the question was - could there be a way to recreate some

item.title: udon + carbonara = 🤯🇯🇵🇮🇹 crispy gyoza skins used as taco shells? if you’re Italian, Mexican, Japanese - stay with me…🤣 AD because this is fusion food, that celebrates bringing food cultures together. I went behind the scenes at the @wagamama test kitchen
